title: USGS/Bureau of Mines Minerals Yearbook Volume III/IV (Area Reports: International) -- Full Volumes, 1965, 1970, 1975, 1980
source_org: US Bureau of Mines (predecessor of USGS National Minerals Information Center)
source_url: https://archive.org (mirrored from University of Wisconsin Ecology and Natural Resources Digital Collection / USGS Publications Warehouse)
countries: all countries covered by each volume -- includes ARG, TUR, SAU (as 'Kuwait and Saudi Arabia' combined chapter in some years), RUS/SUN (USSR), VEN, and most other world countries alphabetically
time_coverage: Volume publication years 1965, 1970, 1975, 1980 -- each volume's Iran chapter itself reports data for multiple prior years (see companion extraction dataset for exact year coverage per volume)
frequency: annual publication, each containing 3-5 years of trailing production data per country chapter
units: N/A (raw PDF volumes; see extraction dataset for unit-tagged data)
notes: THIS IS THE PRE-1990s USGS MINERALS YEARBOOK GAP FLAGGED IN A PRIOR ROUND'S NOTES (the existing usgs-minerals-yearbook/irn/ folder only had 2016-2023 editions; this closes that gap for Iran back to 1965). Each volume covers ALL countries alphabetically (full 'Area Reports: International' volume), so these 4 files are also a ready-made source for pre-1990s comparator-country mineral data (Argentina, Turkey, Saudi Arabia/Kuwait combined chapter, USSR, Venezuela chapters confirmed present in the 1970 volume's table of contents) -- not yet extracted for comparators in this round, flagged as a natural follow-up. Downloaded via archive.org mirrors of the University of Wisconsin Ecology and Natural Resources Digital Collection (the modern UW-Madison 'search.library.wisc.edu' front-end for this same collection renders as a JS-heavy IIIF-style page-image viewer that neither WebFetch nor the project's browser tool could reliably extract text/PDF from in this session -- archive.org's mirror, which hosts a proper flat searchable PDF plus OCR derivatives, was the working path). Individual country chapters were located within each large volume via `pdftotext -layout` full-volume extraction + grep for 'THE MINERAL INDUSTRY OF IRAN' running headers to find PDF page ranges (1965: PDF pp.1001-1012 / printed pp.995-1002; 1970: PDF pp.393-404 / printed pp.385-396; 1975: PDF pp.517-530 / printed pp.511-522; 1980: PDF pp.501-512 / printed pp.493-502). See companion dataset usgs-minerals-yearbook/historical-pre1990-volumes/iran-production-extraction/ for the transcribed Iran production tables and narrative highlights (Sar Cheshmeh copper mine, Aryamehr/Isfahan Steel Mill, etc.). Part of this project's Round 38 (mining/dams/industrial subsectors) hunt.
